predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary_company
predicates.description: The company is a subsidiary company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company is a parent company.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The micro-company employee criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The micro-company turnover criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The micro-company balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one micro-company criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: Not more than one micro-company criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company in the last closed financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding value added tax of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year.
